RESET_PASSWORD.WE_HAVE_SENT_LINK: We have sent a password reset link to:
RESET_PASSWORD.PLEASE_CHECK_INBOX: Please check your inbox and follow the instructions to reset your password.
RESET_PASSWORD.CHECK_SPAM_FOLDER: If you don't see the email within a few minutes, check your spam or junk folder.
RESET_PASSWORD.FORGOT_PASSWORD_SUBTITLE: Worry not, we’ll send you instructions to help you reset it.
RESET_PASSWORD.NEW_PASSWORD_SUBTITLE: Set a strong password to secure your account.

messagesToast.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
